Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class AnalyticsSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.AnalyticsSettings
public class AnalyticsSettings extends Metadata

Java class for AnalyticsSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AnalyticsSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="alwaysGenPreviews" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="analyticsAdoptionMetadata" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="autoInstallApps" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="bundleCachingOptOut" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canAccessAnalyticsViaAPI" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canAnnotateDashboards" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canEnableSavedView" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canExploreDataConversationally" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canShareAppsWithCommunities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canViewThumbnailAssets" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAmazonRedshiftOutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAnalyticsEncryption" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAnalyticsSharingEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAutoCompleteCombo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAutonomousExperience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAzureDLGen2OutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableC360GlobalProfileData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCreateLegacyDataflows" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCrmaDataCloudIntegration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDashboardComponentSnapshot" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDashboardFlexiTable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDashboardToPDFEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEmailReportsToPortalUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFirebirdEditor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFloatingReportHeaders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInsights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInsightsHCMode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningReportBuilder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLotusNotesImages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMassEnableReportBuilder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNewChartsEngine" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNullDimension" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgCanSeeLivePreviews" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgCanViewTableau" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgCanViewThumbnailForOA" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgHasMobileOfflineEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgHasWatchlistEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableQueryLiveConnectors" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRemoveFooterForRepDisplay" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRemoveFooterFromRepExp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableReportHideXlsExportPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableReportInlineEditPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableReportNotificationsEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRequestPrioritySchdl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableS1AnalyticsEclairEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableS3OutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSFXJoinedReportsEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSalesforceOutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSecureImageSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSnowflakeOutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTableauHyperOutputConnector" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUseOldChartsLookAndFeel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveAssetsNewDateVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveCustomFiscal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveIndexMVDim" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveIndexMVDimV2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveMultiCurrency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveRecordNavigation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveReplication" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveSharingInheritance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveSqlCFIndexing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWaveTrendedDatasetCleanup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="etlOrchestrationPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isDiscoveryOptimizationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isHighVolumePushbackEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="maxHoursAppInProgress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recipeDirectDataPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recipeFiscalPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recipePreCachingOptOut" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recipeStagedDataPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="replaceBlankMeasuresWithNulls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="setWaveIsYearEndFiscalYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sonicEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="turnOnTimeZones" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
